files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+// Consume all seeded records while forcing intermediate flushes.
+from_kafka env("KAFKA_TOPIC"),
+           count=3,
+           offset="beginning",
+           batch_size=2,
+           batch_timeout=1s,
+           options={
+             "bootstrap.servers": env("KAFKA_BOOTSTRAP_SERVERS"),
+             "group.id": "tenzir-test-from-kafka-batch-size"
+           }

@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+error: `batch_size` must be greater than zero
+ --> tests/operators/from_kafka/error_batch_size_zero.tql:6:23
+  |
+6 |            batch_size=0
+  |                       ^ 
+  |

@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+error: `batch_timeout` must be a positive duration
+ --> tests/operators/from_kafka/error_batch_timeout_zero.tql:6:26
+  |
+6 |            batch_timeout=0s
+  |                          ^^ 
+  |
